widgets_values:
[Style] Photorealistic futuristic space warfare, 8K, blockbuster fleet battle, cold silver hulls, rim-lit by a gas giant below.

[Duration] ~5 seconds.

[Scene] Low orbit above a massive ringed gas giant. A kilometer-scale carrier hangs in frame, launch bays glowing. Six small interceptors pour out in formation.

Shot 1: Slow crane down from the carrier's hull. Interceptors accelerate outward in a tight V-formation, exhaust trails curling against the planet's cloud bands.

Shot 2: Cut to medium chase shot behind the lead interceptor. It pitches up slightly, weaving through drifting orbital debris shields—movements smooth and controlled, not violent.

Shot 3: Wide static hold, then gentle push-in. The swarm spreads into attack spread as a distant enemy silhouette flickers on the horizon—one brief red warning glint on a HUD reflection in the canopy.

Constraints: stable proportions, realistic space physics feel, smooth motion, no subtitles, no watermark, no logo.
